sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - SIMON [I] de Broyes ([1145]-[May 1208/Jul 1210]).
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - SIMON [I] de Broyes, son of HUGUES [III] Seigneur de Broyes & his first wife Stephanie de Bar Dame de Commercy ([1145]-[May 1208/Jul 1210]).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon Ier de Commercy於1145年出生時，他的父親Hugues lll De Broyes20歲，母親Stéphanie De Bar-le-Duc21歲。他於1175年之前與Nicole de Salins在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1208年5月享年63歲。

zh-hans.of,Broyes,Marne,France: 法国哈帕格-亞登芒內布洛也斯
zh-hans.Broyes, Oise, Hauts-de-France, France: 法国豪-德-福朗斯奧易布洛也斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon Ier de Commercy于1145年出生时，他的父亲Hugues lll De Broyes20岁，母亲Stéphanie De Bar-le-Duc21岁。他于1175年之前与Nicole de Salins在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1208年5月享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Yiddish ber ‘bear’, probably influenced by the early medieval European practice of giving animal names to people. It is often paired with Dov in order to provide a Hebrew name in certain rituals.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon Ier de Commercy was born in 1145, his father, Hugues lll De Broyes, was 20 and his mother, Stéphanie De Bar-le-Duc, was 21. He married Nicole de Salins before 1175, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died in May 1208, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon Ier de Commercy est né en 1145, son père, Hugues lll De Broyes, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Stéphanie De Bar-le-Duc, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Nicole de Salins avant 1175, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en mai 1208, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon Ier de Commercy 1145 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues lll De Broyes 20 und seine Mutter Stéphanie De Bar-le-Duc 21. Er hat vor 1175 in Europa Nicole de Salins geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im Mai 1208 im Alter von 63 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Ier de Commercy è nato il nel 1145, il suo padre, Hugues lll De Broyes, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Stéphanie De Bar-le-Duc, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Nicole de Salins prima del 1175, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel maggio 1208, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon Ier de Commercyが1145年に生まれた時，父Hugues lll De Broyesは20歳，母Stéphanie De Bar-le-Ducは21歳であった。1175年以前にヨーロッパでNicole de Salinsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1208年5月に63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon Ier de Commercy(이)가 1145년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues lll De Broyes(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Stéphanie De Bar-le-Duc(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1175년 이전 우럽에서 Nicole de Salins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1208년 5월 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Ier de Commercy nasceu em 1145, seu pai, Hugues lll De Broyes, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Stéphanie De Bar-le-Duc, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Nicole de Salins antes 1175, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em maio de 1208, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon Ier de Commercy родился в 1145 г., его отцу по имени Hugues lll De Broyes было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Stéphanie De Bar-le-Duc, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Nicole de Salins перед 1175 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер май 1208 г. в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon Ier de Commercy nació en 1145, su papá, Hugues lll De Broyes, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Stéphanie De Bar-le-Duc, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Nicole de Salins antes de 1175, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en mayo de 1208, a la edad de 63 años.
